standard.title_en: Standard for Design of Outdoor Wastewater Engineering
standard.chapter: 4 排水管渠 / 4.2 水力计算
standard.disclaimer_zh: 本文件为工程预检用的关键参数摘录，不替代正式规范原文。条文编号请以官方 PDF 为准。
standard.disclaimer_en: Curated snapshot of key hydraulic thresholds for pre-checking only. Not a substitute for the official text. Verify clause numbers against the official PDF.

min_diameter.description_en: Minimum pipe diameter by pipe class

sewage.note: 污水管、合流管道起始最小管径 DN300

stormwater.note: 雨水管、合流管道最小管径 DN300

combined.note: 合流管道最小管径 DN300

inlet_connection.note: 雨水口连接管最小管径 DN200

min_slope.description_zh: 最小设计坡度（与最小管径对应）
min_slope.description_en: Minimum design slope corresponding to minimum diameter

design_fill_ratio.description_zh: 重力流污水管道设计充满度上限（雨水/合流管按满流 h/D=1.0）
design_fill_ratio.description_en: Maximum design fill ratio for gravity sewage pipes (storm/combined computed as full flow, h/D=1.0)

min_velocity.description_zh: 最小设计流速（设计充满度/满流时）
min_velocity.description_en: Minimum design velocity at design fill / full flow

sewage.note: 污水管道在设计充满度下 ≥ 0.6 m/s

stormwater.note: 雨水管道及合流管道满流时 ≥ 0.75 m/s

max_velocity.description_en: Maximum design velocity by pipe material
